scripts.build: pnpm --filter @nestra/contracts build && pnpm --filter @nestra/api build && pnpm --filter @nestra/client build
scripts.db:logs: docker compose --env-file infrastructure/.env -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml logs --follow postgres
scripts.db:start: docker compose --env-file infrastructure/.env -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml up --detach --wait postgres
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @nestra/contracts build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names contracts,api,web "pnpm --filter @nestra/contracts dev" "pnpm --filter @nestra/api dev" "pnpm --filter @nestra/client dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @nestra/contracts build && pnpm --filter @nestra/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @nestra/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @nestra/client typecheck
